title: Encrypting large artifacts and streaming workloads with Vault
summary: Use Vault Transit with envelope encryption to securely protect large artifacts and streaming workloads without sending payloads to Vault.

title: Azure hub-and-spoke generally available for HCP Vault Dedicated
summary: Azure hub-and-spoke networking is now generally available in HCP Vault Dedicated, supporting enhanced cloud security maturity with private connectivity.

title: Announcing native AI agent support in HashiCorp Vault
summary: HashiCorp Vault now enables enterprises to manage agentic IAM including trusted identities, delegated authorization, fine-grained controls and end-to-end tracing.
